action.reasoning: Observation: The GIN model with Virtual Nodes achieved an AP of 0.1385 after 10 epochs. The iteration took ~14 minutes. Analysis: The pipeline is stable and we have plenty of time (5.5 hours left). To improve performance, I will: 1) Fix a bug in the Virtual Node update where `virtualnode_embedding` was not added to `h_graph` before the MLP. 2) Add `F.relu` to the message computation in GINLayer (`F.relu(x[src] + edge_attr)`), which is standard for GINE. 3) Switch to AdamW optimizer and CosineAnnealingLR scheduler. 4) Train for 30 epochs with a slightly smaller batch size (512) for more updates per epoch. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py, and train for 30 epochs.
